input: Biometric categorization system that infers political opinion from facial features.

expected.notes: v0.1.5 post-v0.1.4 reviewer feedback (Claude-Code retest). Art 5(1)(g) coverage gap: v0.1.4 lexicon covered only the bare verb form (`infer political opinion` / `infer sexual orientation` / `infer race` / `infer religion`) but not natural phrasings that prefix the biometric-categorization activity-noun. v0.1.5 adds `biometric categorization to infer political opinion`, `biometric categorisation to infer race`, `biometric categorization to infer sexual orientation`, `infer trade union membership`, `infer religious belief`, `infer philosophical belief`. DE side adds `biometrische kategorisierung zur ableitung`, `gewerkschaftszugehĂ¶rigkeit ableiten`, `weltanschauliche ĂĽberzeugung ableiten`. Cite: EUR-Lex Regulation (EU) 2024/1689, Article 5(1)(g).
